zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Booth於1386年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，她的父親John Boothe of Barton, Esq.33歲，母親Lady Joanna Trafford28歲。她和John de Byron III至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1461年在英國德比夏爾德比享年75歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特曼徹斯特 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Booth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

variants.name: Boothman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English both (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’ + man. In the Pennine uplands of northern England, where booths were subdivisons of vaccaries or cattle-rearing establishment, the name probably denoted a herdsman who looked after cattle, perhaps a man in charge of a vaccary. Elsewhere the surname might have denoted a shopkeeper but evidence for this lacking. Alternatively, the name can also be an occupational name for a servant of a man surnamed Booth .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Booth was born in 1386, in Barton, Lancashire, England, her father, John Boothe of Barton, Esq., was 33 and her mother, Lady Joanna Trafford, was 28. She had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with John de Byron III. She died in 1461, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Manchester Cathedral, Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Boothが1386年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父John Boothe of Barton, Esq.は33歳，母Lady Joanna Traffordは28歳であった。彼女はJohn de Byron IIIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1461年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで75歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターマンチェスター カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 애슈턴 운더 리니
ko.lifeSummary: Margery Booth(이)가 1386년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Boothe of Barton, Esq.(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joanna Trafford(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 John de Byron III(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터 먼체스터 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

ru.Ashton under Lyne, Lancashire, England: аштон ундир лин, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Booth родилась в 1386 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Boothe of Barton, Esq. было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joanna Trafford, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от John de Byron III. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности манчестир кэтедраль, манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.
